businessRules: Clients place orders; the same client may place many orders over time.
An order passes through different operations until it is completed; each operation execution consumes a material, and operations of the same order may consume different materials.
The same operation type may be related to different orders.
Operations are executed at work centers; a work center executes operations for many orders over time.
Each order has a system registration date; each operation execution has a start date and time, as well as a quantity.
Quantity must be greater than zero.
